name: RaceTextSyntheaToOmop
title: Synthea Patient.extension(us-core-race).text → OMOP race_concept_id (Other recovery)
description: Source-specific derived map that recovers the 'Other' (8522) vs 'Unknown' (8552) distinction that the generic OMB ombCategory map loses. Synthea writes BOTH ombCategory=UNK AND text='Other' for patients of races outside the 5 OMB categories — the generic race-omb-to-omop map sends those to 8552 (Unknown). This map looks at the `text` extension and routes 'Other' → 8522, 'Unknown'/null → 8552. Use as fallback when ombCategory=UNK only. See `mapspec/GAPS.md` §7.
